allow: Bash(powershell -Command "Add-Type -Path ''''Assembly/Mirror.dll''''; [Mirror.NetworkClient].GetMethods\(\) | Where-Object { $_ame -like ''''*Prefab*'''' -or $_ame -like ''''*Spawn*'''' } | Select-Object Name, { \($_etParameters\(\) | ForEach-Object { $_arameterType.Name }\) -join '''', '''' } | Format-List")
